Meaning.En: A building or part of a building where goods are sold to customers, or where repairs or services are provided.
Meaning.Example: I bought this coffee mug at a small shop downtown.

Situation.Vi: Mua sắm đồ dùng hàng ngày tại cửa hàng tiện lợi.
Situation.En: Buying everyday items at a convenience store.

Situation.Vi: Tiệm sửa đồng hồ có tên là “The Time Shop”.
Situation.En: A watch repair shop named “The Time Shop”.

Meaning.Vi: Đi mua sắm; đi cửa hàng (để mua)
Meaning.En: To go to a store or shop to buy things.
Meaning.Example: We’re going to shop for new shoes this weekend.

Situation.Vi: Mẹ đang đi cửa hàng mua đồ ăn tối.
Situation.En: Mom is out shopping for dinner ingredients.

Situation.Vi: Họ thích shop online thay vì đến cửa hàng.
Situation.En: They prefer shopping online rather than going to physical stores.
